{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231546488A02C0291E395B54457E"}"},"total":6302},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7436558085026251544","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的真好，作者牛逼就牛逼在写一个孩童的心理上，没有像别人写成了成年人心理，金手指虽然大，不大5岁的孩子真活不过两年。讨厌的也有，你想说什么别放在正文中，还帮人推书也放在正文里，看着不方便。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731462627,"group_id":"7391930489361157182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"可以天马行空，别把你做梦给写出来吧，胡言乱语的还要打赏要赞","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9ki1apgpvxJB1VKH3Qu+dY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/75f9270b1a954d01993de96aea96f22a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776796960&x-signature=GlrW1phv3p97rNf8E1TFDi%2FWBbY%3D","user_id":"95957717726","user_name":"大明哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95957717726","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662428614,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391930489361157182","book_info":{"abstract":"原名：【从奶娃诸侯王到天下共主·基建】
【爽文+萌团子开局+游戏外挂+基建+种田+战争+家国天下+萌宠+爱情？】

【正经简介】
如果你从海上来，一路往西就会遇到一座不似人间的繁华城。
那里是幽王殿下的封地——幽州。
王朝末年，饿殍遍地，诸侯割据，而幽州是唯一的桃花源。
那里有最坚固的城墙，最繁华的城池…



【不正经简介】
皇子靖生母早逝，本人也无雄心壮志，从五岁起就梦想早日封王就藩，然后——去封地躺平平。

可惜，随他转世而来的大型基建游戏『京都繁华梦』早早挖个坑把他埋了……
【城主之心使用后，身强体健、百毒不侵、刀枪不入；城主将掌握领土内一切动向，但同时彻底和幽州绑定，城破，人亡。】
幽王殿下瑟瑟发抖，他才活了六年，幽州已经破过一次了……

刚进入封地，长在深宫的大王就傻眼了。
这么荒凉这么穷……他不会是第一个饿死在封地的诸侯王吧？！
文盲儿童幽王殿下写的最熟练的文字是:父皇、皇兄、舅舅~饭饭饿饿！




食用指南：

一，架空！基建！种田！
二，私设如山，金手指粗大，大到吓死人，爽文。
三，有可能有官cp，可能比较后期","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/cad1ea0cab226222709b023352ca7044","author":"桃溪野","author_id":"","book_id":"7391930489361157182","book_name":"开局一个城池，我靠系统逐鹿天下","book_short_name":"太平未央","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0a838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"11.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7392193396774814270","read_count":"110726","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1444032"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"665","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,空间,前世今生,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7c6b7c6230da848e2cfd1868a41c435e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779436008&x-signature=1DpJQQdNWWtOv3uUsKmJ26UVopo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3861937849642279","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"239"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231546488A02C0291E395B54457E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":26,"forwarded_count":0,"lis n_duration":8873,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9846,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":61248},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7476283602383160126","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"又是一本没完结我就先打分的文！不是靠惊才绝艳的文笔，也不是草蛇灰线伏笔一大堆的那种设定（故弄玄虚），更不是燃点不够刀来凑的类型（故作高深），全文都是通俗易懂的文字，轻快带点可爱的节奏，既不强行煽情，也不尬燃，但带动着读者情绪又是持续递进的，说明作者笔力好，能把控住笔下的人物和剧情！
没错，我就是在捧一踩一，我就是讨厌那些故弄玄虚和故作高深的小说，点进去看了又弃很浪费时间的好吧！这本好，两天就让我追平了，要开始难受的追更了[委屈][委屈][委屈][委屈]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740712322,"group_id":"7391930489361157182","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N76Cdy47iupFSHkY55iMecnbbgKpDppyoZmq2anvUTRS","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1827815065931984","user_name":"爱吃葱丝鸡脯肉的叶江"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1827815065931984","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7391930489361157182","book_info":{"abstract":"原名：【从奶娃诸侯王到天下共主·基建】
